meaning: n.出版者,发行人 /n.出版者/订阅者
examples: He wrote to me in care of my publisher.
I've also sold one or two to a publisher.
The agreement assigns copyright to the publisher.
Last spring, when Internet stocks were sizzling, magazine publisher Ziff-Davis issued a tracker for its ZDNet Web division.
Dow Jones, the publisher of the Wall Street Journal, trades at 53 times 2002 projected earnings.
